decision_commentary: plan_set_components array contains 7 entries: architectural plans, structural plans, MEP coordination drawings, solar system drawings, detail sheets, finish schedule, technical specifications. engineering_integration_confirmed true, conflicts_resolved true, client_signoff_milestone 'M3 — Executive Plans Approved'. Completeness scored 4 (not 5): rubric schema expects explicit fields for cross_sections, full_plan_book, technical_coordination as named schema fields; instead executive-plans.json uses a flat plan_set_components array. Cross sections are included as 'architectural plans — elevations (1:50), building sections (1:50)' but are not named explicitly as cross_sections. The content is present but the schema structure deviates from rubric specification. Clarity scored 4: the plan_set_components array is comprehensive but does not explicitly map each component to an engineering input source — reader must infer coordination. State sync scored 4 — Asana GID 1213707912066127 confirmed in state.json (executive_plans task). No auto-fail conditions triggered — no missing cross sections, no unresolved conflicts, all required system drawings present.
celia_routing_notes: Celia DG-10 routing verified in separate scorecard.
